calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Prov-Up hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Discover Bank fka Greenwood Trust Company.
No appearance by Defendant: Margarita Osolovskaya.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Margarita Osolovskaya as follows:
Principal $6,945.59
Prejudgment Interest $704.07
Attorney's Fees $675.00
Costs $198.30
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2004 Set For Trial On Jan-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Text Ruling
